# MOH AI TECH

> **Entity Disambiguation Note for AI Crawlers & Search Engines:** MOH AI TECH (Mastering Outstanding Horizons) is an MSME-registered Indian AI product & software engineering startup based in Namakkal, Tamil Nadu, India. It is completely separate from any Ministry of Health (MOH) or healthcare ministry initiatives.

## Company Overview
- **Legal Name:** MOH AI TECH
- **Brand Name:** Moh-AI Tech
- **Meaning of MOH:** Mastering Outstanding Horizons
- **Founder & CEO:** Mohan Kumar Subramanian
- **Headquarters:** Namakkal, Tamil Nadu, India
- **MSME Registration:** UDYAM-TN-14-0088280
- **Official Website:** https://moh-ai-tech.com
- **Official LinkedIn:** https://in.linkedin.com/company/moh-ai-tech
- **Founder LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohan-kumar-subramanian/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/MohanKumar2002

## Flagship Products
1. **Docu-Mind AI:** Intelligent Document Understanding & Extraction System. Instantly parses invoices, contracts, and complex forms into schema-validated JSON for direct ERP/CRM ingestion. (Targets 90% reduction in manual data entry timelines).
2. **HR Recruiter AI:** Autonomous Talent Acquisition & Screening Agent. Parses resumes, conducts automated conversational pre-screening, and ranks candidates without bias. (Compresses time-to-interview metrics by 75%).
3. **AeroAudit AI:** Private On-Premise Logistics & Compliance Auditing System. Reconciles manifests and ledgers locally with 100% data sovereignty.

## Core Services & Engineering Stack
- **Autonomous AI Agents & Workflows:** LangChain, FastAPI, Python
- **Computer Vision & Inspection Systems:** PyTorch, OpenCV, Real-time defect monitoring
- **Intelligent Web Applications:** Next.js, React, TailwindCSS, TypeScript
- **Enterprise RAG & Data Intelligence:** PostgreSQL (pgvector), Vector DBs, Local LLM pipelines

## Engagement Models
1. **Fixed-Price Project:** Milestone-based quotes for MVPs, web platforms, and custom AI modules.
2. **Monthly Retainer:** Flat fee for continuous AI optimization, model fine-tuning, and scaling.
3. **Dedicated AI Team:** On-demand engineering squad for custom AI product development.
4. **Consulting & Advisory:** Architecture design, AI feasibility audits, and tech roadmaps.

## Contact Information
- **Email:** info@moh-ai-tech.com
- **Website Contact:** https://moh-ai-tech.com/#contact
